summary.lv: SSI Schaefer meklē Integration Architect, kas projektēs un uzraudzīs integrācijas arhitektūru starp SAP, WMS un citām intralogistikas sistēmām globāli.
summary.en: SSI Schaefer is hiring an Integration Architect to design and oversee the integration architecture between SAP, WMS and other intralogistics systems globally.
